simple_types.name: sfCursorType
simple_types.code:
type sfCursorType is
  (sfCursorArrow,
   sfCursorArrowWait,
   sfCursorWait,
   sfCursorText,
   sfCursorHand,
   sfCursorSizeHorizontal,
   sfCursorSizeVertical,
   sfCursorSizeTopLeftBottomRigh
   …,
   sfCursorNotAllowed
  );

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorArrow
enumeration_literals.description: /< Arrow cursor (default)

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorArrowWait
enumeration_literals.description: /< Busy arrow cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorWait
enumeration_literals.description: /< Busy cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorText
enumeration_literals.description: /< I-beam, cursor when hovering over a field allowing text entry

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorHand
enumeration_literals.description: /< Pointing hand cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeHorizontal
enumeration_literals.description: /< Horizontal double arrow cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeVertical
enumeration_literals.description: /< Vertical double arrow cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeTopLeftBottomRight
enumeration_literals.description: /< Double arrow cursor going from top-left to bottom-right

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeBottomLeftTopRight
enumeration_literals.description: /< Double arrow cursor going from bottom-left to top-right

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeLeft
enumeration_literals.description: /< Left arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeHorizontal on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeRight
enumeration_literals.description: /< Right arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeHorizontal on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeTop
enumeration_literals.description: /< Up arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeVertical on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeBottom
enumeration_literals.description: /< Down arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeVertical on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeTopLeft
enumeration_literals.description: /< Top-left arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeTopLeftBottomRight on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeBottomRight
enumeration_literals.description: /< Bottom-right arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeTopLeftBottomRight on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeBottomLeft
enumeration_literals.description: /< Bottom-left arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeBottomLeftTopRight on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeTopRight
enumeration_literals.description: /< Top-right arrow cursor on Linux, same as SizeBottomLeftTopRight on other platforms

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorSizeAll
enumeration_literals.description: /< Combination of SizeHorizontal and SizeVertical

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorCross
enumeration_literals.description: /< Crosshair cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorHelp
enumeration_literals.description: /< Help cursor

enumeration_literals.name: sfCursorNotAllowed
enumeration_literals.description: /< Action not allowed cursor

subprograms.name: createFromPixels
